connectors.name: In 2 / ADC 2
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input or can be used as an analogue input

connectors.name: Serial Out
connectors.description: Connect to the output pin of the download connector for the PICAXE download circuit

connectors.name: Serial In
connectors.description: Connect to the 22K resistor of the PICAXE download circuit

connectors.name: Reset
connectors.description: Connect via a 4K7 resistor to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit. This pin must be connected via the 4K7 resistor or the PICAXE will not operate correctly. This pin can also be connected to a switch to 0V (ground) to provide a manual 'reset button' for the PICAXE

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: Out 0 / Infraout
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output and can be used to drive an Infra-Red LED

connectors.name: Out 1
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 2
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 3
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 4
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 5
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 6
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 7
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: In 6 / Keyboard Clock
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input. If using the PICAXE with a PS/2 keyboard this pin should connect to the 'PS/2 Keyboard Clock' signal ( pin 5 on a PS/2 mini-DIN connector ) and a 4K7 resistor should connect from this pin to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: In 7 / Keyboard Data
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input. If using the PICAXE with a PS/2 keyboard this pin should connect to the 'PS/2 Keyboard Data' signal ( pin 1 on a PS/2 mini-DIN connector ) and a 4K7 resistor should connect from this pin to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: In 0 / ADC 0 / Infrain
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input or can be used as an analogue input. The output from an Infra-Red Receiver can be connected to this pin

connectors.name: In 1 / ADC 1
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input or can be used as an analogue input
